productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Shirts
description: Composition Blue melange shirt made of 100% cotton, with full arms and buttoned cuffs, tipped collar, front buttoned placket, pocket on left chest with embroidered Big Ben logo and curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Add immense style to your formal look with this formal shirt from united colors of benetton. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full arm sleeves add a touch of regality to your personality. Pair it with formal trousers and black leather footwear for that classic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'', Shoulders-18"
